sequence.speaker: Hero
sequence.text: Isn't that bad for you?

sequence.speaker: Lady
sequence.text: Yeah, but hell, what are you gonna do.

sequence.speaker: Hero
sequence.text: Could I have some?

sequence.speaker: Lady
sequence.text: No sweetie, you don't want to end up like me, all washed up and nowhere to go. I used to be quite a looker, still am, but I draw a different crowd now.

sequence.speaker: Lady
sequence.text: I'll tell you, I've been smoking a lot more lately. It feels like there's nothing to do this town, it's lost a lot of its spirit. Talking to all these lame-o's is such a drag, it's draining my life force... You know what I mean?

sequence.speaker: Hero
sequence.text: Yeah, I do.

sequence.speaker: Lady
sequence.text: You look so sad all on your own, it's a whole without a half, isn't it?

sequence.speaker: Hero
sequence.text: I guess.

sequence.speaker: Lady
sequence.text: I went to the party by the bridge... won't be doing that again.

sequence.speaker: Hero
sequence.text: Veronica said it was "all out of whack".

sequence.speaker: Lady
sequence.text: That's one way of putting it.

sequence.speaker: Lady
sequence.text: I think people are having a harder time coping these days. Everybody has some kind of distraction, something to obsess over. No one's really helping since you left.

sequence.speaker: Lady
sequence.text: It's not very fair, is it..?

sequence.speaker: Hero
sequence.text: I'm sorry.

sequence.speaker: Lady
sequence.text: It's not your fault. Too many people stop trying to do anything about the situation they're in because they feel like nothing they do matters.

sequence.speaker: Lady
sequence.text: Can one person really make a difference?

sequence.speaker: Hero
sequence.text: You've made a difference to me.

sequence.speaker: Lady
sequence.text: Then you already know the answer, don't you? We can't save everyone. But we can show up.

sequence.speaker: Lady
sequence.text: I rely on you a lot, as well. Whether I like it or not. I do, really...

sequence.speaker: Hero
sequence.text: I know.

sequence.speaker: Lady
sequence.text: Thank you...

sequence.speaker: Hero
sequence.text: For what?

sequence.speaker: Lady
sequence.text: Listening to me.
